description: Baseline: harness-validation feature with 8 artifacts. artifact_coverage=1.0, schema_compliance=1.0, state_alignment=1.0, phase_coverage=0.857, evidence_quality=0.375. Evidence quality is the main gap â€” evidence refs not resolving relative to feature dir.

description: Fixed evidence ref path resolution in score_workflow.sh (unquoted heredoc, FD variable). Evidence quality: 0â†’1.0. All 12 evidence refs now resolve correctly. quality_score: 0.62â†’0.98. Only gap is phase_coverage at 0.8571 (INTAKE skipped, correct for small features).

description: Added CI pre-commit hook (scripts/pre-commit-quality-check.sh) and EVAL-007 for ci_hook. Complete rewrite of score_workflow.sh with 7 evals: artifact_coverage, schema_compliance (ajv strict), state_alignment, state_drift, phase_coverage, evidence_quality, ci_hook. All at 1.0. Pre-commit hook auto-detected by scoring script.

ajv strict JSON schema validation for run-history.json and state.json
state drift detection catches field mismatches between state.md and state.json
